steps.title: Read the command
steps.content: Lady Britomart tells Stephen he must face life seriously and advise her because she can no longer carry the whole burden. In that context, to assume responsibility means to take on that responsibility.

steps.title: Match the duty meaning
steps.content: A means draw a conclusion, B means imitate, and D means take for granted as a premise. None fits being assigned a family duty. The needed word means take on or commit to a task. The answer is C.
